content.zh: 由于上游服务器维护，ubuntu-releases 镜像将于 3月12日 00:00–06:00 暂停同步，请临时使用官方源或其他镜像站。
content.en: Due to upstream server maintenance, the ubuntu-releases mirror will pause syncing on March 12, 00:00–06:00. Please use the official source or another mirror temporarily.

content.zh: 镜像站现已提供华为 openEuler 操作系统的完整镜像，欢迎使用。
content.en: The mirror now provides a full mirror of Huawei's openEuler OS. Welcome to use it.
